layout.sectionSubtitle: Manage accounts, tokens, and model access in one place.

signUp.title: Create your account
signUp.emailCodeSent: Code sent. Please check your inbox.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your account email and we’ll send a password reset link.
forgotPassword.success: Reset email sent. Please check your inbox.

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.description: Enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.missingToken: The password reset link is invalid or missing a token.
resetPassword.success: Password reset. Please sign in again.

terms.prefix: By signing up, I agree to

validation.usernameLength: Username must be between {{min}} and {{max}} characters
validation.usernamePattern: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens, and must start and end with a letter or number
validation.passwordLength: Password must be between {{min}} and {{max}} characters
validation.emailInvalid: Email must be a valid email address
validation.emailVerificationCodeInvalid: Email verification code must be 6 digits
validation.identifierInvalid: Enter a valid username or email address

passwordReset.subject: {{app_name}} password reset
passwordReset.html:
{{app_name}}

Reset your password

Click the button below to continue resetting your account password.

Reset password

This link expires in {{expire_minutes}} minutes.

If the button does not open, copy this link: {{reset_link}}

Recipient: {{email}}

registration.subject: {{app_name}} registration code
registration.html: {{app_name}} registration code: {{code}}. It expires in {{expire_minutes}} minutes. Recipient: {{email}}
